name: saucelabs-appium-tests
description: Appium + TypeScript automation suite for SauceLabs Mobile Sample App

scripts.report: npm run report:generate && npm run report:open
scripts.test: concurrently --kill-others -n APPIUM,TESTS --success command-TESTS "ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk appium --port 4723" "wait-on -t 30000 http-get://localhost:4723/status && wdio run config/wdio.android.conf.ts"
